goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'norwich'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should 'arrive by 10:30'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to norwich
The train should leave on thursday and should arrive by 10:30
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
